project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Project.Task.CSharpBase.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Task.executor": "Debug", ".NET Project.Task1.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Task2.2.executor": "Debug", ".NET Project.Task2.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Task3.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Task4.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Task6.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.lookFeel", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
